name: miniappbench-html-responses
description: GENERATE interactive HTML mini-apps instead of static text responses. Build real-time calculators, interactive demos, dynamic forms, data visualizations, embedded tools, responsive interfaces, and working applications in conversation. TRANSFORM user experience from passive reading to active interaction, enable complex functionality, reduce context length, and deliver production-ready micro-applications.
paperTitle: MiniAppBench: Evaluating Shift from Text to Interactive HTML Responses in LLM Assistants
